queries.question: Show all the country and bluegrass singers who play guitar.
queries.sql:
SELECT Musician.Name 
FROM Musician
WHERE (Musician.Genre = "Country Singer" OR Musician.Genre = "Bluegrass Singer") AND Musician.Instrument = "Guitar"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?musician a :Musician .
  ?musician p:name ?name .
  ?musician p:Genre ?genre_w .
  ?musician p:Genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?musician p:Instrument ?instrument_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?genre_w) = "Country Singer" || STR(?genre_w2) = "Bluegrass Singer")) && STR(?instrument_w) = "Guitar"))
}

queries.question: Give me all country singers and bluegrass singers who play guitar.
queries.sql:
SELECT Musician.Name 
FROM Musician
WHERE Musician.Genre = "Country Singer" OR Musician.Genre = "Bluegrass Singer" AND Musician.Instrument = "Guitar"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?musician a :Musician .
  ?musician p:name ?name .
  ?musician p:Genre ?genre_w .
  ?musician p:Genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?musician p:Instrument ?instrument_w .
  FILTER((STR(?genre_w) = "Country Singer" || (STR(?genre_w2) = "Bluegrass Singer" && STR(?instrument_w) = "Guitar")))
}
